title: Sports Email Scheduler
summary: A Python automation tool that emails users when their favorite teams play.
highlights: Uses BeautifulSoup to pull game data from a website
Automated daily email delivery using cron
Addition of a Streamlit app to get user email and their teams
Emails the user email the games of the day and where to watch them

title: Resume Website
highlights: Designed and built a Flask-based portfolio website with dynamic project pages powered by JSON data

title: MLB Pitcher Strikeout Prediction System
summary: An end-to-end sports analytics pipeline that scrapes MLB pitcher and opponent data, engineers model-ready features, and generates daily strikeout predictions using regression and classification models.
highlights: Built a daily pipeline for predicting MLB starting pitcher strikeouts
Scraped pitcher game logs and advanced statistics from Baseball Reference and Baseball Savant
Combined pitcher, team, and matchup features into model-ready datasets
Trained regression models to predict strikeout totals
Trained classification models to predict strikeout outcome categories
Created app interfaces using Streamlit and FastAPI for prediction access
